diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thanks for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Jordan. How can I help?
[Caller] Hey Jordan. I play on PS5 but I want to start playing on PC too. Can I link my PSN account to a HoYoverse account so I can use the same save?
[Agent] Great question, and yes — cross-save between PlayStation and PC is absolutely supported. Let me pull your account so I can walk you through the exact steps for your setup. UID please?
[Caller] 603245891.
[Agent] Thanks, Marcus. Confirmed — I see a PSN-linked account, America server, Adventure Rank 58. Here's how the link works: your PSN account is currently the primary login. To play on PC with the same save, you'll link a HoYoverse account to this PSN account, not the other way around. Once linked, you can log in on PC using either credential and share the exact same progress.
[Caller] OK, so nothing gets duplicated or reset?
[Agent] Correct — no reset, no duplicate, one save. Your AR58, your characters, your Archon quest progress, your wish history, all of it stays exactly as is. Here's the process: on the Genshin login screen on PC, select 'HoYoverse Account,' then 'Link a different account,' sign in with PSN, and it'll prompt you to create or attach a HoYoverse account. Once done, you'll have two ways to sign in, same save.
[Caller] Got it. One thing — can I still buy top-ups on PS and have them show up on PC?
[Agent] Yes, Genesis Crystals are account-wide once linked. But worth knowing: PlayStation top-ups remain PlayStation-only for that specific transaction per Sony's billing rules. Crystals once credited are shared. Welkin Moon bought on PSN works everywhere too.
[Caller] Perfect. Any risk I should know about?
[Agent] One thing — always keep 2FA on the HoYoverse side enabled once linked, since that becomes an alternate login path. I'll email you the full linking walkthrough plus a 2FA setup guide. Want me to send it to the email on file?
[Caller] Yes please.
[Agent] Sent. Anything else?
[Caller] Nope, that covered everything. Thanks Jordan.
[Agent] Glad I could help, Marcus. Enjoy exploring Teyvat on the big screen!
